commands.repair_reason: This draft, maintainer-labeled PR from a repo member should remain in normal maintainer release validation rather than becoming a ClawSweeper repair job.; Cleared: The diff only changes a generated hash file and local package-script heap limits; it adds no dependency, workflow permission, secret handling, external download, or publish-path code execution source. (sha=bde7251b44fd6b99cab1f035081e8fa554239fe7)
commands.review_summary:
The PR refreshes the tracked Plugin SDK API baseline hash and raises the `plugin-sdk:api:*` Node heap cap from 4096 MiB to 8192 MiB in `package.json`.

Reproducibility: no. not independently in this read-only review. Source inspection shows the release gate currently routes through a 4096 MiB Plugin SDK API check, and the PR body supplies the Blacksmith OOM and 8GB retry evidence.
commands.review_followup: This draft, maintainer-labeled PR from a repo member should remain in normal maintainer release validation rather than becoming a ClawSweeper repair job.
